title: ernodea littoralis var. angusta
intro: Ernodea littoralis var. angusta, also known as the narrow-leaved Ernodea or coastal Ernodea, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to the coastal regions of southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ernodea littoralis var. angusta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb for various health issues. Ernodea littoralis var. angusta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
